summary: Tested discount-codes Supabase migration (CRUD + dual-endpoint validate parity) and digital-products filtering on storefront/blog. Backend: 10/10 pytest pass — CRUD works, newly created code is immediately validatable on BOTH /api/discount-codes/validate and legacy /api/discount/validate (single source of truth confirmed), and is removed from BOTH after DELETE. Validate without cart_total returns graceful {valid:false, message:'Minimaal bestelbedrag is €X.XX'} (no 500). /api/products returns 15+ items with 5 digital. Frontend: /knuffels shows 10 cards, 0 digital. / (homepage) shows 10 product links, 0 digital. All 5 blog detail pages render the correct BlogDigitalProductCallout with the expected data-testid and a link to the matching /product/digital-* page. /blogs list has 6 cards, all resolving to 200 (no dead links). Two minor duplicate violations found inside individual blog posts (not blocking).

minor.issue: Both endpoints share Supabase as expected, but return DIFFERENT response shapes — new uses {discount, discount_value, free_shipping}, legacy uses {discount_amount, type}. Functionally equivalent but consumers must know which shape to expect. Consider aligning shapes or documenting the contract.
No admin auth required on CRUD endpoints — anyone with URL can create/update/delete discount codes (anonymous tests succeed without Bearer token). Lock down with admin auth dependency.

Increment is read-then-write (not atomic). Concurrent usage on the same code can lose increments, allowing more uses than max_uses. Use Supabase RPC or `UPDATE … SET current_uses = current_uses + 1 WHERE current_uses < max_uses RETURNING *`.

integration_issues.issue: /blog/waarom-huilt-baby-s-nachts: image https://plxbmkwuacbdzookygtg.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/product-images/bearbrown-main.png appears 2 times in the article body. Violates 'each image must appear at most once per blog post'.

/blog/beste-slaapknuffel-2026: link /product/14 appears 2 times in the article body. Violates 'each product link must appear at most once per blog post'. (relatedProducts was emptied but /product/14 is still duplicated inside the content/top-5 block.)

Console error 'Error fetching products, using fallback: TypeError: Failed to fetch' still appears (carried over from iteration_26). Same observation: hits something other than REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Non-blocking but should be traced.

action_items: Remove the duplicate in /app/frontend/src/pages/BlogWaaromHuiltBabyPage.jsx (image rendered twice).
Remove the duplicate /product/14 link in /app/frontend/src/pages/BlogBesteSlaapknuffel2026Page.jsx — product 14 appears 2x in the body (Top-5 list + another mention).

(Security) Add admin auth guard to /api/discount-codes POST/PUT/DELETE — currently open to anonymous requests. The list endpoint can stay public if needed but mutating endpoints must require Bearer admin JWT.
(Concurrency) Make /api/discount-codes/use increment atomic to prevent over-use under concurrent checkouts.
(Optional) Align response shape between /api/discount/validate (legacy) and /api/discount-codes/validate so frontend doesn't need to handle two field names (discount vs discount_amount).
critical_code_review_comments: discount_codes.py: clean, async-friendly, no _id leakage, proper HTTPException usage, consistent Dutch error messages. Good single-source consolidation.
Code-id generated as uuid4()[:8].upper() — 8-char codes give ~2^32 space; collision risk is low but the uniqueness constraint relies on the `code` field, not `id`. Fine.
Missing admin auth on CRUD is the most important security gap — easy fix via Depends on existing admin dependency.
_to_admin_shape silently swallows fields not in the mapping (e.g., free_shipping is exposed but free_shipping flag is also derived from discount_type elsewhere). OK.
Validate endpoint correctly handles missing cart_total (defaults to 0 and returns graceful min-order error).

success_rate.frontend: Storefront filter 100%, Blog callouts 5/5 present, Blog uniqueness 3/5 clean (2 with duplicates)

seed_data_creation: Test created and deleted 1 discount code: TEST_ITER27_PCT (percentage 15→20, min_order 25→50). All test data cleaned at end of test_delete_discount_code_and_verify_removed_on_both_endpoints. Verified Supabase has 0 rows with code starting with TEST_ after run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend discount-codes consolidation is verified end-to-end. Pytest: pytest backend/tests/test_discount_codes_supabase.py -v. Two minor blog content fixes pending (duplicate image in BlogWaaromHuiltBabyPage.jsx, duplicate /product/14 link in BlogBesteSlaapknuffel2026Page.jsx). Re-run the playwright dup check from this iteration after fixes — code in scratch: query article/main imgs and a[href*='/product/'], count duplicates. /knuffels (10 cards, 0 digital), homepage (10 product links, 0 digital), all 5 callouts and /blogs links are all green. Security debt: discount-codes CRUD is unauthenticated.
rca of the issue: N/A — this iteration is feature/regression verification.
